# CounselO — Online Legal Consultation Platform

CounselO is an online legal consultation platform serving Saudi Arabia and Syria. Clients submit their legal question via WhatsApp or email and receive a professional written response within 24 hours. No office visit required. Available in Arabic and English.

## Key Pages

- [Home — Saudi Arabia (English)](https://counselo-legal.com/sa)
- [Home — Saudi Arabia (Arabic)](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/ar)
- [Home — Syria (English)](https://counselo-legal.com/syr)
- [Home — Syria (Arabic)](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/ar)
- [Services — Saudi Arabia](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services)
- [Services — Syria](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services)
- [Legal Blog and Guides](https://counselo-legal.com/blog)
- [Selected Legal Work and Redacted Documents](https://counselo-legal.com/our-work)
- [About](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/about)
- [Contact](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/contact)

## Services

- [Family Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/family-law) — divorce, custody, inheritance
- [Business & Commercial Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/business-law)
- [Employment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/employment-law)
- [Real Estate Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/real-estate)
- [Foreign Investment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/foreign-investment)
- [Administrative Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/administrative-law)
- [Criminal Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/criminal-law)
- [Banking & Finance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/banking-finance)
- [Tax Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/tax-zakat)
- [Cyber Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/cyber-law)
- [Medical Malpractice](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/medical-malpractice)
- [Insurance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/insurance-law)
- [Arbitration](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/arbitration)
- [Enforcement Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/enforcement)
- [Companies Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/companies-law)
